title: Q1 2026 Open House: October Was Just The Start - Cohort After Cohort Beating On Margin
text: Q1 2026 Open House: October Was Just The Start - Cohort After Cohort Beating On Margin & Resale Velocity While Acquisitions Accelerate. Opendoor's official Q1 2026 earnings release emphasized that the improvement trajectory established in October is continuing across subsequent cohorts. Key highlights: October 2025 and January 2026 cohorts represent the best combination of margin and resale velocity in company history, Resale contribution margin improved every month since September 2025, finishing Q1 at 4.4%, a 3.4 percentage-point jump from Q4, Homes purchased rose 45% quarter-over-quarter to 2,474, Homes under contract increased over 300% quarter-over-quarter to more than 5,000. The company emphasized that cohort-level improvements, if sustained, support management's confidence in achieving profitability targets. The narrative shift toward cohort-level metrics rather than company-level losses reflects the company's view that newer acquisition vintages are fundamentally stronger than historical periods.
